commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an effective Pi compaction reserve-token helper, rewires preflight compaction and memory-flush gates to use it, updates focused tests, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +25, Tests +126, Docs +1. Total +152 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main still reads `reserveTokensFloor` in both threshold gates while docs describe `reserveTokens` as the headroom knob. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can attempt a narrow current-main port, but the session-state compatibility proof must be explicit before merge.

target.title: fix(compaction): respect effective reserve tokens in compaction gates
target.body:
## Summary
- repair #69379 so preflight compaction and memoryFlush threshold gates use the effective reserve token budget consistently
- keep the patch narrow to compaction threshold resolution and existing focused tests
- preserve contributor credit for @chrispatil and acknowledge related prior source PR #67297

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/pi-settings.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-state.test.ts

## Review gates
- rebase onto main f4c9e71e4eab26787290d9a71a6498bce6c28415
- run Codex /review and address every finding before merge
- verify Greptile/Codex bot comments are resolved or non-actionable

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69379
Related superseded PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67297

ProjectClownfish replacement details:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-199269-agentic-merge
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69379, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67297
- Credit: Repair the existing contributor branch for #69379 and preserve @chrispatil attribution in branch history and PR context.; Mention related prior source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67297 by Magicray1217 as superseded prior art where relevant.; Do not include security-routed #50694/#65622/#66716 in this fix path.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed; pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/pi-settings.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-state.test.ts
- Repair fallback: To https://github.com/chrispatil/openclaw.git
